payload.title_zh: 豆流 AI v2.5.0 — P0 安全加固与核心能力夯实
payload.title_en: Douluo AI v2.5.0 — P0 Security Hardening & Core Capability Solidification
payload.summary_zh: 豆流 AI 2.5.0：36处多租户数据隔离加固、GEO评分引擎Bug修复、自动跑词关键词联动、RPA脚本补齐（搜狐发布+B2B注册）、AI监测定时调度上线、多维度AI品牌可见度评估体系完善。
payload.summary_en: Douluo AI 2.5.0: 36 multi-tenant isolation hardening, GEO scoring engine bugfix, auto-runner keyword passthrough, RPA script completion (Sohu publish + B2B registration), AI monitoring scheduler, brand visibility assessment enhancement.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级后执行 php artisan migrate、php artisan optimize:clear，重启RPA引擎(node rpa-engine/server.js)，重启队列worker。新增partner_id迁移已包含。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: After upgrading, run php artisan migrate, php artisan optimize:clear, restart RPA engine and queue workers. New partner_id migration included.
